title: Sales Executive[ must own a car/B2B sales, facilities management, or operations in a healthcare setting is a strong advantage]
description:
Join a leading regional distributor of Professional & Industrial Cleaning Solutions.

We specialize in high-performance cleaning systems and hygiene solutions, offering an extensive range of products including:

  • Floor care equipment for carpet, stone, and tile maintenance
  • High and ultra-high pressure water cleaning systems
  • Industrial vacuum and dust collection systems
  • Rider sweepers and scrubbers for both indoor and outdoor use
  • Professional wipes, pads, and cleaning tools
  • Public hygiene and environmental care products
  • ISO 9001-certified maintenance chemicals developed in-house

We are currently seeking a driven and customer-focused Sales Executive to join our team. This role will focus on promoting our comprehensive range of cleaning equipment, accessories, chemicals, and consumables — with a particular emphasis on serving the healthcare sector.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:
  • Manage and grow assigned accounts while actively prospecting and developing new business opportunities
  • Develop in-depth knowledge of our product lines to effectively identify customer needs and recommend appropriate solutions
  • Perform hands-on demonstrations of equipment and products; conduct occasional presentations to mid-sized groups, including senior management
  • Maintain strong relationships with clients by providing reliable after-sales support and professional service
REQUIREMENTS:
  • Sales- and customer-oriented mindset with a passion for building relationships
  • Strong sense of discipline, integrity, initiative, and the ability to work independently while being a collaborative team player
  • Basic proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), WhatsApp, and other communication tools
  • Diploma or equivalent, preferably in Business, Nursing, or Healthcare-related fields
  • Prior experience in B2B sales, facilities management, or operations in a healthcare setting is a strong advantage
  • Possession of a Class 3 driving license and personal vehicle is preferred

postedCompany.description:
Linkedcorp is a professional recruitment firm specializing in providing comprehensive talent solutions. Our services range from general staffing, executive search, temporary & contract hiring, project hiring, and HR outsourcing services, ensuring that we are equipped to meet the diverse needs of organizations of all sizes. With a team of experienced and knowledgeable professionals, we are committed to delivering results that exceed expectations and help companies achieve their strategic goals.  


Our commitment to excellence and delivering value to our clients sets us apart in the industry. We are dedicated to building long-term partnerships and providing a positive experience to all of our clients. Whether you're looking to expand your team or take your company to the next level, LinkedCorp is the partner you can trust to help you achieve your goals.
postedCompany.name: LINKEDCORP HR CONSULTANCY PTE. LTD.
